case_title: GOLDEN GATE MEAT CO VS HUNGRY HOUSE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $550.50 FILED BY GOLDEN GATE MEAT CO AS TO DEFENDANT HUNGRY HOUSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-30-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATE MEAT CO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUNGRY HOUSE $550.00 PRINCIPAL, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $579.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
